subcodes.first_line: O assured leaf! Although you two sisters have, from the very beginning, endured the utmost persecution from the enemies of the Beauty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ورقه موقنه هر چند شما دو خواهر از بدایت در نهایت تحمل اذیت از اعداء جمال
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @martyrs and martyrdom, @consolation and comfort, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
